title: Add `lint_off --contents` in configuration files.
body:
Towards #4562, add a new configuration "lint_off" option `--contents`.

If `-contents` is provided, the input files must contain the given wildcard (with '*' or '?'), and are waived in case they match.   Typical use for this is to match a version number present in the Verilog sources, so that the waiver will only apply to that version of the sources.

Specifically, we'll use this to have UVM waiver rules that only apply against UVM sources.
